title: Promotion Record
description: Immutable append-only record of an agent's promotion or demotion across maturity levels

evidence.description: Array of file references to generated evidence artifacts (e.g. eval runs, metric baselines)

gate_results.description: Array of references to the StageGateResult artifacts that cleared this promotion

approver.description: Identity of the system or human that approved the promotion

reason.description: Context string for the promotion or demotion justification
